changelog:
Added:
- JetBrains AI service network preset
- Packaging tools in the sandbox image
- Session disconnect logging in `vibed`
- `allow-cidr` config option to explicitly allow local IP ranges ([#10](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/10))
- `extra-hosts` config option ([#11](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/11))
- Global `upstream-dns` config option to set the upstream DNS server ([#12](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/12))
- How-to for running with a local LLM provider ([#13](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/13))

Fixed:
- Preserve formatting in `allow-http`/`allow-dns` appends ([#8](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/8))
- State-file cleanup race in session test teardown ([#9](https://github.com/bernd/vibepit/pull/9))
- `install -m` parameter in the Dockerfile
- Force anonymous auth for cosign image signature verification
- Distinguish forced detaches from clean shell exits

added.msg: Packaging tools in the sandbox image
`allow-cidr` config option to explicitly allow local IP ranges
Global `upstream-dns` config option to set the upstream DNS server
How-to for running with a local LLM provider

fixed.msg: State-file cleanup race in session test teardown
Force anonymous auth for cosign image signature verification
Distinguish forced detaches from clean shell exits
